name: IngestErrorAndStatusContracts
description: Stable safe workflow, parser, compatibility, resource, overlap, and recovery outcomes.
schema_def: IngestError {code, category: usage|validation|unsupported|unsafe_source|compatibility|permission|resource|reconciliation|overlap|ledger|interrupted|conflict|unexpected, safeMessage, batchId?, candidateId?, mutationPossibility: none|possible|confirmed, durableState?, retryAction: none|retry|repreview|resume|abandon|correct_source, field?}
BatchStatusSummary {batchId, status, adapterId?, createdAt, updatedAt, outcomeCounts, nextAllowedOperations[]}
BatchStatusDetail {summary, manifestRevisionId?, approved, receiptStatus?, terminalCounts, unresolvedFrontier, lastStableError?, retainedArtifactKinds[]}

Errors and status never contain source paths, statement rows, descriptions, amounts, balances, full bank identifiers, requests, manifests, stack traces, or parser exceptions. Exit categories mirror the shared Tally contract; structured code remains authoritative.
